pages.diagnosis: Homepage competes for broad 'ai tools for creators' queries. Current title is good but could test product-led variant. Missing social proof in description.
pages.titleA: Free AI Tools for Creators — Captions, Bios, Titles & Hashtags
pages.titleB: AI Caption Generator & Creator Tools — 100% Free, No Signup

pages.descB: Free AI-powered caption generator for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube & more. Plus bio, title, and hashtag tools. No signup needed — try in 5 seconds.
changes: Custom CTA: 'Generate Captions Now' + social proof subtext
pages.hypothesis: Adding '50K+ creators' social proof should lift CTR 10-15%. Product-led title B captures transactional queries.

pages.diagnosis: Primary money page. Current title good but platform names should come before parenthetical for keyword match.

pages.titleB: AI Caption Generator — Free Captions for Instagram, TikTok & YouTube
pages.descA: Generate scroll-stopping captions with AI in 5 seconds. Includes hashtags, CTAs, and short variants. Free, no signup.
pages.descB: Need better captions? Our AI generates platform-optimized captions with hashtags and CTAs. 100% free, no login.
pages.hypothesis: Platform names in title front improve keyword match. Scheduling-focused affiliate CTA has natural intent match. Expected CTR +8-12%.

pages.diagnosis: Specificity about char limits and 17 options is a differentiator vs competitors.

pages.descB: Stop staring at a blank bio. Our AI creates 17 bio options for your platform in seconds — professional, creative, witty & more.
pages.hypothesis: Specific numbers (17 options, char limits) create curiosity signal. Expected CTR +10% and lower bounce.

pages.diagnosis: YouTube-specific variant B may capture more specific intent than generic 'AI Title Generator'.
